title: THE TWIDDLERS 36 Emoji Spring Jump Up Pop Up Toys for Kids, 6cm - Smiley Face Birthday Party Favours with Multicolour Hair, Multipack Goody Bag Fillers and Jumping Toy Gift Set, Classroom Prizes
features: Endless Fun: Our 36 mini pop up toys party bags are a hit with both kids and teens, providing hours of fun and entertainment. Simply pop them up and watch them jump, causing hysterics among those playing.

Pop and Play: Our mini emoji jumping toys are easy to play with. Simply press down until the suction sticks, wait a few seconds until they suddenly pop, and watch the delayed action make it even more entertaining.

Perfect Party Favours Kids: Our funny face pop-up toys are perfect as party bag fillers for kids, party games, piñata fillers, stocking fillers, prizes, or simply for sheer amusement for both kids and adults.

Safe and Durable Jumping Toys for Kids: Made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, these yellow party toys for kids are safe for kids to use. Their sturdy construction ensures they can withstand plenty of playtime without breaking.
Satisfaction Guaranteed: These bouncing jump up toys make a great gift idea for children and adults alike. They're perfect for parties, playtime, or just for a fun distraction when you need it.
description: Product Description Mini Puzzle Cubes Pocket-sized brain teasers that twist, turn, and challenge young minds. Fun, colourful, and perfect for party bags or classroom rewards. Pop Up Toys Press, wait, and watch them pop! These classic toys bring surprise and giggles, making them ideal for party bags, gifts, or sensory fun. Colouring Books Packed with bold illustrations, these books spark creativity and quiet time. Great for travel, parties, or everyday artistic adventures. Party Bag Fillers A mix of fun treats from toys to trinkets. Perfect for birthdays, classroom rewards, or any celebration where smiles are guaranteed. Perfect Party Bag Fillers Mini puzzle cubes, pop-up toys, colouring books, and assorted party bag fillers provide endless fun for kids. Whether it's twisting the cube, popping up toys, or getting creative with colouring, these items make great additions to any celebration or a fun activity for any occasion. Endless Entertainment For All Mini pencils, crayons, paper aeroplanes, mini challenge cubes, and mini 4 in a row games offer hours of entertainment and learning. Perfect for parties, school rewards, or travel, these items keep children engaged while helping to boost their creativity, motor skills, and problem-solving abilities. A variety of fun and creative items for every occasion! From mini puzzle cubes, pop-up toys, and colouring books to crayons, mini pencils, paper aeroplanes, mini challenge cubes, and mini 4 in a row games, these engaging products offer endless entertainment, perfect for parties, rewards and play. Play and Learn Enhance critical thinking & problem-solving skills with mini puzzle cubes, colouring books & games that encourage creativity & cognitive development. On-The-Go-Fun Perfect for travel, these compact toys & activities, such as paper aeroplanes & mini puzzle cubes, keep children entertained on long journeys! A Thoughtful Gift These interactive toys make great gifts for birthdays & celebrations. From pop-ups to mini challenge cubes, they offer fun & lasting entertainment. Fun for Everyone Who says kids should have all the fun? Our mini puzzle cubes & brain teasers are perfect for adults too, providing stress relief & a mental challenge!
